title: Caffè Paszkowski

performances. A unique experience where café culture, dining, mixology, and music blend in the heart of Florence.  ...    Since 1903, Paszkowski has been an icon in the vibrant heart of Florence. Today, it brings together history and flavor with live music and beloved Italian dishes. A beacon of timeless elegance, blending the allure of history with modern  ...    modernity.
